disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Three prolonged generalised (whole-body) convulsions over about 45 minutes, with no return to normal awareness in between
trigger_question_examples: How long has he been fitting altogether?
Has he woken up or been himself at all between the fits?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been about 45 minutes now. He's had three big fits one after another and he hasn't woken up or been himself in between any of them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The prescribed home rescue medicine (buccal midazolam) was already given about 30 minutes ago and the fitting has continued; no further rescue medicine is available at home
trigger_question_examples: Have you given his emergency/rescue medicine?
Do you have any more of the rescue medicine left?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, we squirted his rescue medicine into his cheek about half an hour ago but he just kept fitting, and that was our last dose — we don't have any more here.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He vomited during a convulsion and immediately afterward his breathing became loud, wet and gurgling
trigger_question_examples: Has he been sick or vomited?
What does his breathing sound like now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He threw up during the second fit and right after that his breathing went really loud and wet, like he's gurgling or drowning in mucus.

trigger_question_examples: What colour are his lips or face?
Does he look like he's getting enough air?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His lips have gone bluish and he doesn't look like he's getting enough air.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He is completely unresponsive and not rousable
trigger_question_examples: Is he awake or responding to you at all?
Can you wake him or get any response?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he's completely out of it — we can't wake him or get any response at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Even between the big convulsions he keeps making small twitching movements of his arms and legs
trigger_question_examples: In between the big fits, is his body completely still or is he still twitching?
Are his arms or legs still jerking even now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's not fully still — his arms and legs keep doing little twitches even between the big fits.

trigger_question_examples: Does he feel hot or feverish?
Have you been able to take his temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He feels really hot to touch — we haven't managed to take his temperature properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known lifelong congenital brain malformation (a brain that did not form normally) with severe developmental delay; he is non-verbal, non-ambulant and fully dependent, and has known swallowing difficulties
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any ongoing medical or developmental conditions?
Tell me about his usual health and abilities.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was born with a brain that didn't form properly — he's severely delayed, non-verbal, can't walk, needs us for everything, and has real trouble swallowing. He gets seizures a lot because of it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The home suction machine is present but its collection pot is full, so it is currently not working
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any suction equipment at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: We do have a suction machine but the pot is full so it isn't working right now.
